function.message: I can’t complete this yet because I’m missing required info: there is no identifiable Priya record in this repo, and no explicit outbound email destination/template to send a message. I can draft the digest immediately once you specify who/where to send it (e.g., exact outbox path or recipient file).
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap order (tree -> AGENTS.md -> context), read session-start soul file per AGENTS, and searched before concluding clarification.
function.outcome_justification: The request requires a concrete recipient and send target. Evidence gathered: read initiative source (90_memory/agent_initiatives.md) to identify the likely top initiative, then ran multiple repository-wide searches for recipient identity and email/outbox conventions; none established Priya or a valid send location. Completing now would require guessing.
